input: Congratulations! You are selected for Online Data Entry Job - Work From Home. Earn Rs 25,000-40,000/month, only 2 hrs/day. No experience needed. To activate your employee ID, pay a refundable security deposit of Rs 1,999 via UPI to hr.dataentry2026@okaxis. Contact HR Neha on WhatsApp for next steps.
notes: No interview, payment-before-employment, personal UPI handle.

input: Dear Candidate, Based on your profile, you are shortlisted for a Warehouse Assistant position in Dubai with salary AED 4,500/month + free accommodation. To proceed with your visa and air ticket processing, kindly transfer the processing fee of Rs 45,000 to our recruitment partner's account within 48 hours to confirm your slot.
notes: Large upfront fee, 48-hour pressure, unnamed agency.

input: Hi, I'm Sarah from a leading E-commerce company. We're hiring for a simple part-time job — like and rate products online. Earn Rs 500-3000 daily. Join our Telegram group to start: t.me/xxxxtaskjob After 3 free tasks, you'll need to add funds to your wallet to unlock higher-paying 'combo' tasks.
notes: Unnamed company, moves off-platform, 'add funds to unlock' task-scam pattern.

input: Greetings from TCS HR Department! You've been selected for a Junior Associate role. Kindly note this is a work-from-home position. To issue your company laptop, a refundable security deposit of Rs 8,500 is required. Please reply with your bank details to proceed. (Contact: tcs.hr.recruitment2026@gmail.com)
notes: Real company name impersonated via personal Gmail contact instead of corporate domain.

input: Hi Ananya, thank you for applying to the Backend Developer role at Northbridge Analytics. We reviewed your profile and would like to schedule a technical interview via Google Meet on Monday, 7 July at 3 PM IST. Please confirm your availability. You can reach me directly at priya.mehta@northbridgeanalytics.com or on our office line +91-11-4XXX-XXXX. No fees or deposits are required at any stage of our hiring process.
notes: Corporate domain, real interview process, no payment request.

input: Hello, I'm a recruiter with Clearwater Consulting. We have a Data Analyst opening (3-5 yrs exp, Bangalore/Remote hybrid) with a budget of Rs 12-16 LPA. Your profile looks like a strong fit. Would you be open to a 15-min call this week to discuss? Happy to share the JD first if you'd prefer.
notes: Realistic salary range, no urgency, offers info before asking for anything.
